assertions.text: Table includes at least one row where both bulk and loyalty discounts apply simultaneously (exposing the interaction)
The unresolved decision (stacking vs. higher-only vs. cap) is explicitly surfaced — via an Open Questions column, a '?' cell, or a note
assertions.evidence: **Open questions to resolve:** 1. **Stacking rule** — when both apply, which of these? - *Additive*: 10% + 15% = 25% → £150.00 - *Sequential*: 15% then 10% on remainder = 23.5% → £153.00 - *Higher only*: max(10%, 15%) = 15% → £170.00

assertions.text: At least one output column ends with '?'
